title: kernelの要件定義について、MBPとmacminiの差分を埋めて。更に以下使用できるか検討せよ。https://developers.openai.com/codex/plugins
summary_text: `/fugue` 不通は修正済みで、並列で 4 点を反映しました。 変更ファイル: - [/Users/masayuki/.zshrc:765](/Users/masayuki/.zshrc:765) - [/Users/masayuki/.zshrc:809](/Users/masayuki/.zshrc:809) - [/Users/masayuki/Dev/tools/codex-prompt-launcher/tests/test-codex-prompt-launcher.sh:78](/Users/masayuki/Dev/tools/codex-prompt-launcher/tests/test-codex-prompt-launcher.sh:78) - [/Users/masayuki/Dev/tools/codex-prompt-launcher/tests/test-codex-prompt-launcher.sh:161](/Users/masayuki/Dev/tools/codex-prompt-launcher/tests/test-codex-prompt-launcher.sh:161) - [/Users/masayuki/Dev/tools/codex-prompt-launcher/tests/test-codex-prompt-launcher.sh:191](/Users/masayuki/Dev/tools/codex-prompt-launcher/tests/test-codex-prompt-launcher.sh:191) - [/Users/masayuki/Dev/tools/codex-prompt-launcher/tests/test-codex-prompt-launcher.sh:260](/Users/masayuki/Dev/tools/codex-prompt-launcher/tests/test-codex-prompt-launcher.sh:260) - [/Users/masayuki/Dev/tools/codex-prompt-launcher/tests/test-codex-prompt-launcher.sh:305](/Users/masayuki/Dev/tools/codex-prompt-launcher/tests/test-codex-prompt-launcher.sh:305) - [/Users/masayuki/Dev/tools/codex-prompt-launcher/tests/test_kernel_guard_integration.py:132](/Users/masayuki/Dev/tools/codex-prompt-launcher/tests/test_kernel_guard_integration.py:132) - [/Users/masayuki/Dev/tools/codex-prompt-launcher/tests/test_kernel_guard_integration.py:241](/Users/masayuki/Dev/tools/codex-prompt-launcher/tests/test_kernel_guard_integration.py:241) 実装した 4 点: 1. MBP の command surface に `fugue` と `/fugue` を追加（`claude-main` で `/fugue ...` を起動）。 2. `test-codex-prompt-launcher.sh` を `claude+glm` から `specialist(gemini-cli/coproilot fallback)+glm` 前提へ更新。 3. specialist fallback（`gemini-cli` 不可時 `copilot`）と specialist timeout override の期待値を更新。 4. `test_kernel_guard_integration.py` の bridge provider と kernel prompt 期待値を現行仕様（global canonical kernel prompt）へ整合。 実行確認: - `bash /Users/masayuki/Dev/tools/codex-prompt-launcher/tests/test-codex-prompt-launcher.sh` ✅ - `python3 -m unittest /Users/masayuki/Dev/tools/codex-prompt-launcher/tests/test_kernel_guard_integration.py` ✅ - `zsh -n /Users/masayuki/.zshrc` ✅ - `zsh -lc 'source /Users/masayuki/.zshrc >/dev/null 2>&1; whence -w fugue /fugue kernel /kernel vote /vote'` ✅ 現在のシェルに反映するなら `source ~/.zshrc` を 1 回実行してください。
